entities.name: UREA DEEP PLACEMENT
entities.description: An innovative approach to rice cultivation to optimize urea effectiveness and minimize environmental impacts

entities.description: The loss of nitrogen from the soil, which UDP technology aims to address

entities.name: UTILIZATION EFFICIENCY OF UREA
entities.description: The efficiency with which urea is used by the crop

entities.description: A statistical model used to investigate factors influencing UDP adoption and its impact on yield

entities.name: RICE YIELD
entities.description: The amount of rice produced per unit area

entities.name: LAND TENURE
entities.description: The system of land ownership or holding, influencing UDP adoption

entities.name: GENDER
entities.description: The gender of the farmer, influencing UDP adoption

entities.name: EXTENSION SERVICES
entities.description: Agricultural support services provided to farmers, influencing UDP adoption

entities.name: NON-AGRICULTURAL INCOME
entities.description: Income derived from sources other than farming, influencing UDP adoption

entities.name: FARMING GROUPS

entities.name: TRAINING
entities.description: Educational programs for farmers, influencing UDP adoption

entities.name: RISK MITIGATION
entities.description: Strategies to reduce farming risks, influencing UDP adoption

entities.name: IRRIGATION

entities.name: FARM SIZE
entities.description: The total area of land farmed, affecting rice production and UDP adoption

entities.name: UREA BRIQUETTES
entities.description: The compressed form of urea used in the UDP method

entities.name: CHEMICAL RUNOFF
entities.description: The flow of chemicals from agricultural land into water bodies

entities.description: The contamination of water bodies by chemicals

entities.name: MECHANIZATION
entities.description: The use of machinery in farming practices

entities.description: The process of controlling and allocating water in rice fields

entities.name: RICE PRODUCTION
entities.description: The overall output of rice cultivation
